---
title: "Digital Garden"
subtitle: "A space for ideas in progress, experiments, and evolving thoughts"
listing:
  contents: 
    - garden/*/*.qmd
    - garden/*/*.ipynb
    - "!garden/*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [date, title, description, image, categories]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  filter-ui: [title, description, categories]
  image-height: 200px
page-layout: full
---

## Welcome to the Garden 🌱

This is my digital garden — a space between formal publications and fleeting notes. Unlike a blog with polished posts, this garden grows organically with:

- **🌱 Seedlings**: Early ideas, quick experiments, things I'm exploring
- **🌿 Growing**: Developing thoughts, work in progress, evolving frameworks  
- **🌳 Evergreens**: Mature ideas that continue to be refined and expanded

Content here includes:

- Jupyter notebooks exploring data, models, or concepts
- Notes on papers, books, and ideas
- Visualizations and interactive demos
- Technical experiments and code snippets
- Reflections connecting across domains

Nothing here is "finished" — these ideas grow, change, and branch over time. Come back often to see what's blooming.

---

## Garden Contents

::: {#listing}
:::
